Where I've done
my best work

Meta
Jul 2025 – Present
New Mexico
Reliability Engineer, Infrastructure & Systems Automation
  • Built Java Spring Boot and Python automation frameworks with Datadog, consolidating fragmented telemetry from SSH log checks and vendor dashboards into unified reliability dashboards — so SiteOps teams catch failures before users do.
  • Designed REST APIs exposing real-time subsystem health signals, replacing long email escalation chains with a single authoritative source during live incidents.
  • Certified commissioning readiness across dozens of racks and hundreds of compute and network devices — firmware validation, performance profiling — before every production deployment.
  • Diagnosed and resolved 100+ network incidents: DNS misconfigurations, DHCP conflicts, TCP handshake failures. Multiple fixes directly unblocked hardware from joining production clusters on schedule.
Wells Fargo
Jun 2023 – Jul 2025
North Carolina
Backend Software Engineer, API & Cloud Services
  • Replaced a happy-path-only JUnit suite with comprehensive coverage across edge cases, null inputs, and exception paths — raising real release confidence for enterprise banking APIs on Spring Boot.
  • Automated AWS Elastic Beanstalk deployments through Jenkins and Git CI/CD pipelines. Deployment time dropped from 1–2 hours to 10–15 minutes.
  • Decoupled 8–10 tightly bound services by introducing Apache Kafka for async event processing — resolved retry storms from synchronous REST dependencies and stabilised throughput under load.
  • Caught a Kafka idempotency defect in integration testing where duplicate messages triggered redundant transaction processing. Added unique-ID deduplication before it reached production.
Capgemini
Jul 2020 – Aug 2022
India
Software Test & Integration Engineer
  • Built automated test suites for 15–25 Python ETL pipelines. Intercepted a null-handling defect in staging that would have corrupted financial reports relied upon by business decision-makers.
  • Led migration of 6–10 monolithic services into independent Spring Boot microservices, enabling per-service CI/CD and cutting release cycles from half-day shutdowns to 20–30 minutes per service.
  • Deployed and validated containerised services on AWS EKS using Terraform and Kubernetes with auto-scaling policies confirmed under production-level load testing.
  • Replaced manual weekly BI reporting by automating 5–8 recurring SQL and Spark reports. A 2–3 hour Monday task became a fully scheduled, zero-touch dashboard.
